series_metadata.series_title: API reports for Subsequent 148''s and MCO notes
series_metadata.series_description: The Application Processing Interface (API) reports for Subsequent 148''s and MCO notes provide a breakdown of the performance and production of the Managed Care Organization (MCO). This information is sent from the BWC Information Technology (IT) Department to the BWC MCO Business Unit for review.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain these records for 2 years, then retain in the Records Center for 15 years, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain on the BWC server for 17 years, and then destroy. Review the machine readable information every 3 years to ensure that the files can still be accessed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
